CustomField.description: FTE posts - No. of administrative, sales and customer service, or process, plant & machine operatives (SOC Codes 4, 71, 8)
CustomField.inlineHelpText: Of these FTE posts, how many are in administrative, sales and customer service, or process, plant and machine operatives? For example: office managers, secretaries, machine drivers (SOC Codes 4, 71, 8)
CustomField.label: FTE Post - No. Admin/Sales/Cust Serv/Ops
